Products

Spreadsheet-style product catalog management. Edit product details, add new products, control featured status, and preview dynamic PST label cards. Hot Peptide = Yes controls the homepage Hot Peptides carousel.

Checking admin access...

Note: Save errors now display exact Supabase messages. Hot Peptide requires a boolean column named hot_peptide in the product_catalog table.

New products save into Supabase and can appear alphabetically on the public site once active.
Dynamic Label: Hybrid image system: approved PNGs display first; products without approved artwork can use the approved PST blank vial template overlay; products marked Needs Image are hidden publicly.
